blocks.content: A fleet of seventy warships was swiftly advancing through a windless zone on the sea.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Commander, it was a dud.
The ship, unparalleled in size, was equipped with all kinds of weapons.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: No need to report every little thing. This is just a greeting. Fire a shot to get them riled up.
The Jakra Pirates.
A famous pirate group in the South Pacific, led by Jakra, the younger brother of the King of Dionas.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: But it was a dud.
With fiery red hair and wickedly slit eyes, he gazed beyond the sea.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: This is awkward. Open all the gunports.
Iso Jakra.
One of the world's top 100 dangerous individuals, a master of skima with no equal in naval battles.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Open the gunports!
The ship slowly rotated to the left, and 120 gunports opened on the side.
Cannons extended ominously, pointing forward like thorns.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Power level 3. Fire.
The crew member operating the device turned his head.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Uh, Commander, if we fire 120 electric guns simultaneously, our ship might blow up too.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: It's fine, fire.
It wasn't fine at all, but Jakra didn't care about the aftermath.

blocks.speaker: Deputy Commander
blocks.content: How about luring them first? The king ordered us to avoid direct confrontation if possible.
Even for Dionas, making a deal with Arachne wasn't a losing proposition.
The problem was Langi.
While treasures could be stolen again, humans were irreplaceable.

blocks.speaker: Deputy Commander
blocks.content: If we take Langi, we won't be at a disadvantage in negotiations. The opponent is Yahweh. Isn't it unnecessary to provoke him?

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Yahweh, huh.
Jakra had heard of him.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Well… saving the world and all that? Why doesn't a guy like that come to me? Honestly, aren't I the most pitiful human?
The deputy commander got to the point.

blocks.speaker: Deputy Commander
blocks.content: He's strong. His record is impressive.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Yeah, he must be incredibly strong. Meanwhile, I'm just a cowardly, ruthless, and dumb pirate.
The deputy commander didn't deny it.

blocks.speaker: Deputy Commander
blocks.content: Hahaha! Fine! Let's show them a pirate's battle. Kill the weak ones first! Torment and threaten them!
Jakra stood up and pointed forward.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: King or whatever, on the sea, I'm the god! If I say it, it happens! Fire!
The deputy commander sighed and nodded to the crew member, who entered the coordinates.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Opening 120 electric guns. Power level 3. Estimated projectile speed… Mach 4.2.
Those who hadn't yet left the deck watched Poine with blank expressions.
The cannonball that fell with a thud was half-crushed by finger marks.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: What? She caught a cannonball with her hand…
Only a few on the ship knew that Poine was a dragon.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Messiah.
Poine approached Shirone, who was still watching the enemy fleet.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: The projectile speed exceeded the speed of sound. If I hadn't been watching, there would have been damage.
That was why Shirone stayed in position.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: How's your hand?
Even with a dragon's durability, there were limits to biological cells.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: It's fine.
Her fingertips trembled involuntarily, and the skin on the back of her hand was ruptured.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: But I can't guarantee the next one. We should strike first.
If Shirone allowed it, she wanted to fly up and boil the sea with poison.
While she was lost in thought, people evacuated, and Arachne's ship approached.
Knights equipped with flying artifacts soared vertically and landed on the deck.

blocks.speaker: Cairns
blocks.content: What's going on?
Pushing past the knights, Foreign Minister Cairns approached.

blocks.speaker: Cairns
blocks.content: Pirates. Probably under orders from the King of Dionas, but there's no way to confirm.
Cairns didn't feel betrayed.

blocks.speaker: Cairns
blocks.content: Damn! That's just like them. By the way, where's Benahar?
He was probably hiding somewhere on the evacuation ship, but searching three hundred ships was impossible.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is just the beginning. If a battle breaks out, the damage will be uncontrollable. Retreat.

blocks.speaker: Cairns
blocks.content: We'll fight too. We've prepared the elite knights for this.
Having already lost to Shirone in negotiations, Cairns couldn't afford to lose this battle.

blocks.speaker: Cairns
blocks.content: 'If we lose the initiative here, even Maika's artifacts will be taken by Shirone.'

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: …Do as you wish. But if you decide to fight, I'll classify you as a combatant.
It meant he could be a strategic sacrifice if necessary, and Cairns agreed.

blocks.speaker: Cairns
blocks.content: Of course.
As the knights moved to the front of the deck, Poine wore a serious expression.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: They don't seem interested in talking.
In the giant light lens Shirone created, a warship with over 100 open gunports appeared.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Th-that's…
Hot air shimmered above the warship, pushing the sea away at tremendous speed.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Faster.
The knights saw 120 cannonballs approaching faster than sound…

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Evade.
It was impossible to react.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Not being able to dodge something at close range was a familiar pattern to the brain.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Huh? Huh?
When something approached at incredible speed from a distance, the nerves screamed.
Boom!
When the loud noise arrived, the knights felt as if time had reversed.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Hand of God.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Sleight of Hand.
Shirone scattered the 120 cannonballs he had swept up with the Hand of God into the air.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Poine!
As if waiting, Poine's lips twisted wickedly, and her skin split.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: Roar!
Flying into the sky, she transformed, and the knights stared blankly.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: A dragon…
She had a much thinner and longer body than the dragons typically imagined.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Move back!
Sensing the seriousness, the knights retreated with Cairns to the captain's cabin.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: Insignificant humans…
That was why Shirone restricted the apostles' transformations; once transformed, they lost all humanity.

blocks.speaker: Cairns
blocks.content: She's really angry. I can't stop her.
Given her personality, she would act even if it meant being killed by the Messiah.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: Follow me!
Spreading his wings, Shirone flew towards the pirates, with Poine following.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: Grrr!
A boiling sound came from the poison dragon's throat, and thick green smoke billowed out.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: Roar!
Three hundred meters from the pirate fleet, Poine unleashed her breath, the Mist of Despair.
The smoke, like a meteor's tail, quickly filled the sea.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Gas! Gas!
The recharge time was short for one of the Twelve Apostles, only two hours, but the duration exceeded two hours.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Ahhh! My flesh is melting!
Hearing the screams from the giant green cloud, Shirone checked his fleet.
This distance is safe.
If it weren't a windless zone, the toxic smoke would have killed his allies too.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haha, the smell of rotting flesh is delightful.
Shirone glanced at Poine, who was craning her neck to look below, and sighed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What are you doing, using your breath? We can't identify the enemies.
The Messiah allowed the transformation. Without a one-hit kill, our allies would have suffered.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They were indeed handling dangerous weapons.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: Huh?
Suddenly realizing the change in the air, Shirone quickly turned his head.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What?
The green cloud, which had been floating, began to spin faster.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Huge electric bolts shot out from the cloud, striking like lightning.
Magnetic field?
The green smoke dispersed, revealing the warship surrounded by a magnetic field.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Hahaha! Is this all? A dragon is nothing special, right?
Jakra's words made Poine's eyes bloodshot.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: I'll chew you up myself.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Wait.
Something was off about the enemy formation.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: There are fewer ships. Over thirty are missing.
Realizing the situation, Shirone looked back and saw the missing pirate ships chasing the evacuation ships.
It was as if the ships had magically moved through space.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Save the world, Yahweh!

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Huh? Or maybe not? They'll all burn to death in the 'Birdron' soon. Hahaha!
Poine's body emitted poison, but compared to Shirone's killing intent, it was nothing.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: …Wait here.
As his wings flapped, Shirone's body shot across the sea like a flash.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: Grrr!
Flying at incredible speed, Shirone confirmed the pirate ships' position.
Even flying like this takes over two seconds. It's physically impossible.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thousands of shadows rose from the thirty pirate ships like birds taking flight.
Is that Birdron?

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Damn…
As Shirone moved, thousands of Birdrons drew a massive trajectory and struck his fleet.
Boom!
The massive chain explosion was visible even from a distance.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Hahaha! What's this? Yahweh is nothing special? Who will you protect now?
Ignoring the dragon in the sky, Jakra's attitude made his crew tremble.
He's our leader, but he's really crazy.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Despite ignoring the power balance, he always led them to victory, which was amazing.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Hey! If you're angry, come down! I've always wanted to catch a dragon!
When Jakra drew his sword and taunted, Poine turned her head from watching the smoke.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: It is not I who will punish you.
At that moment, a crew member scanning the horizon with a telescope shouted in surprise.

blocks.speaker: Crew Member
blocks.content: Commander! Over there…!
Frowning, Jakra pressed his temples, and his eyes lit up.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: Where the Birdron's smoke had cleared, there was not an evacuation ship but the Hand of God.

blocks.speaker: Jakra
blocks.content: What? Where did they all go?
As if to show him, the Hand of God opened its palm, revealing nothing.
Then, in the next moment, it struck the sea, revealing nearly three hundred evacuation ships.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hand of God.

blocks.speaker: Poine
blocks.content: Sleight of Hand.
